haitian-bouillon.name: Haitian Bouillon

ingredients.prep: ribs and seeds removed, coarsely chopped

ingredients.item: (lightly packed) cilantro leaves with tender stems
(lightly packed) parsley leaves with tender stems

ingredients.prep: bone-in chicken thighs (about 4), cut into bite-size pieces

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 2 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: batata, or caribbean sweet potato; about 1), scrubbed, halved if large
tough stems removed, baby or mature spinach, and/or chopped kale, collard greens, or Swiss chard

instructions:
Pulse ½ small green bell pepper, ribs and seeds removed, coarsely chopped, ½ small white onion, coarsely chopped, ½ large shallot, coarsely chopped, 1 scallion, coarsely chopped, ½ celery stalk, coarsely chopped, ½ Scotch bonnet or habanero chile, 2 garlic cloves, 1 whole clove, ½ cup (lightly packed) cilantro leaves with tender stems, ½ cup (lightly packed) parsley leaves with tender stems, 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, 1 Tbsp. thyme leaves, 2¼ tsp. distilled white vinegar, and 2¼ tsp. fresh lime juice in a food processor or blender until a chunky sauce forms; set aside.
Do Ahead: Epis can be made 4 days ahead. Transfer to an airtight container; cover and chill.

Mix 1 medium onion, coarsely chopped, 3 medium carrots, peeled, sliced crosswise ½" thick, juice of 1 lime, 6 garlic cloves, finely chopped, 1 large sprig thyme, leaves picked, 5 whole cloves, 1½ lb. skin-on, bone-in chicken thighs (about 4), cut into bite-size pieces, ¼ cup coarsely chopped parsley, ¼ cup epis, 2 Tbsp. distilled white vinegar, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot set over low heat to combine. Drizzle 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil over and nestle in 1 Scotch bonnet chile. Cover pot and simmer until juices are slowly bubbling and chicken is mostly cooked through, 30–35 minutes.

Meanwhile, cook 1 lb. patat (boniato, batata, or Caribbean sweet potato; about 1), scrubbed, halved if large, in a large pot of boiling water until partially cooked, 10–15 minutes. Add 2 green plantains, peeled, sliced crosswise 1" thick, and 1 lb. yellow yam (about 1), peeled, cut into 2" pieces, and cook until patat, plantains, and yam are fork-tender, 10–15 minutes. (If your patat needs more time, you can remove plantains and yams and keep them boiling.)

Using a slotted spoon, transfer patat to a cutting board and let cool. Transfer plantains and yam to pot with chicken, then add 4 cups patat cooking liquid and bring to a boil. Add remaining 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton salt, reduce heat, and simmer, uncovered, until vegetables and chicken are tender and liquid is thickened, 15–20 minutes.

Using a paring knife, peel patat and cut into 1½"–2" pieces. Add to bouyon along with 1 bunch watercress, tough stems removed, baby or mature spinach, and/or chopped kale, collard greens or Swiss chard. Stir to combine and cook until greens are wilted. Taste and season with more salt if needed. Ladle bouyon into bowls.

halusky-recipe-lezzet.name: Halusky Recipe

ingredients.item: 200 gr beyaz peynir (bryndza veya lor peyniri)
2 tablespoons of butter or liquid oil
Instead you can use full wheat flour or gluten-free flour mixture; the dough is more dense but healthy.
By adding milk instead of water, you can make the dough more soft and creamy.
You can use the ready-made wet gnocchi or mini cake; it is a practical alternative.

More extra salty taste for parmesan or old bake.
Instead of onion you can use pırasa or green onions.
Instead of butter onion, you can roast with olive oil or coconut oil.
You can add a richer version for roasted rustic, bacon or sucuk.
If you want to make vegetables, you can add it in small parts with carrot or brocoli.
Instead of black pepper you can give a different flavor by adding red pepper or muskat.
If the cheese is salty, you can not add extra salt; you can adjust the taste of according.

instructions: 1. Mix flour, salt, eggs and juice in a bowl.
2. Raw fluid but veccedil;ok should be in consistency that will not be mercury.
3. Magic boil water in a pot and add salt.
4. Pulp, small parchcan be mixed into water with the help of spatula or rende;kün.
5. Bake up to roughly 3–4 minutes.
6. Cook dough fried with cheek.
7. Slate the onion until the golden color area in thin chop and butter.
8. Get a large rough of the boiled Halusky’i.
9. U add cheese to the car and sprinkle the roasted onion.
10. You can taste with Karabiber.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

ham-cheese-twists.name: Ham & Cheese Twists
instructions: Preheat oven to 400˚F (200˚C).
Place the puff pastry sheets on top of each other on a parchment paper-lined baking sheet. Use a large bowl or plate to cut around the outside, and remove the excess dough.
Remove the top piece of puff pastry and sprinkle half of the cheese on the bottom piece, followed by ham and the rest of the cheese. Place the other round of puff pastry on top.
Place a mason jar, or glass in the middle of the puff pastry circle. Cut the dough up to the cup, creating strips all the way around.
Twist each strip twice, so that it’s still attached to the center.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
Mix the mayonnaise, mustard, honey, salt, pepper, and garlic powder together until well combined.
Serve the ham and cheese twists with the dip.
Enjoy!

ham-cheese-and-spinach-stuffed-chicken.name: Ham, Cheese, And Spinach-stuffed Chicken
instructions: Cut a pocket into the side of the chicken breast.
Season chicken with salt and pepper.
Stack the two cheeses and spinach on top of the ham and roll up tightly.
Stuff the chicken with the roll and press the edges of the chicken together to create a seal.
Place the flour, eggs, and bread crumbs into 3 separate bowls.

Being careful to keep the chicken from opening, dip the stuffed chicken in the flour, shaking off the excess. Then dip the floured chicken into the egg, then breadcrumbs, then egg and breadcrumbs again. Coat evenly and shake off any excess breading.
Heat oil in a cast iron pan over medium heat and preheat oven to 375ºF (190°C).
Fry the chicken until golden brown on both sides.
Once the chicken is fried, place into a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes, or until the internal temperature of the chicken reaches a minimum of 165ºF (75ºC).
Enjoy!

hamburger-in-an-air-fryer-a-healthy-alte.name: Hamburger In An Air Fryer, A Healthy Alternative
hamburger-in-an-air-fryer-a-healthy-alte.original_name: Hamburguesa en freidora de aire, una alternativa saludable
instructions: In a bowl we mix the minced meat and onion and the beaten egg. We mix well and we sew. We add Dijon's mustard, ketchup and a tablespoon of bread (or two if the dough remains very soft) and we mix again. We cover the mixture with film paper and put into the refrigerator ½ hour so that flavors are well mixed. Let's get some of the mix and form balls. We clamour with our hands to shape the cheeseburger. We can also use a press or mold for burgers like this.

It purifies air frying for 5 minutes at 210ºC puts paper for air frying (of this type) in the basket. That's not necessary but it'll save you to have to clear with every use. Program the air fryer at 205ºC for 7 minutes Mid-time turn the burgers another option is that you use a grid to cook them, so you don't have to turn them around.
Last time, check if burgers are made at your best. Depending on how little you care about them, to the point or very much, you may need some more minutes.
If you want to add cheese to the cheeseburger do it right now. Programme 1 minute more to 205 ª C
Take out your cheeseburger and serve hot. You can serve it traditional or, as in this case, with a healthy salad.

healthier-double-tomato-bruschetta.name: Healthier Double Tomato Bruschetta
instructions: Preheat the oven on broiler setting. Arrange the artisan bread slices in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Combine the roma tomatoes, sun-dried tomatoes, garlic, olive oil, vinegar, basil, salt, and pepper in a large bowl. Allow the mixture to sit for 10 minutes.
Broil the bread until slightly brown, about 1 to 2 minutes.
Divide the tomato mixture evenly over the bread slices. Top the slices with mozzarella cheese.
Return the baking sheet to the oven and broil until the cheese is melted, about 1 to 2 minutes.

healthier-green-bean-casserole.name: Healthier Green Bean Casserole
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a small baking sheet with foil and coat with cooking spray.
Toss almonds with brown sugar, 1 tablespoon water, and 1/8 teaspoon salt in a small bowl. Spread on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven, stirring once, until toasted, about 10 minutes. Let cool; break apart clusters.
Cook green beans in lightly salted boiling water in a large skillet, covered, about 5 minutes. Drain. Transfer beans to a large bowl of ice water; drain again. Place in a large bowl.

Heat oil in skillet over medium-high heat. Add mushrooms, shallots, garlic, thyme, and 1/4 teaspoon each salt and pepper. Cook, stirring, until mushrooms are browned and tender and any liquid has evaporated, about 8 minutes. Add to beans and toss to coat. Transfer to a 1 ½- to 2-quart baking dish.

Whisk almond milk, wine, cornstarch, and remaining 1/4 teaspoon each salt and pepper in a small bowl. Add to skillet; cook, stirring, over medium heat until thickened and bubbly, scraping up any browned bits, 4 to 7 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in chives. Pour over bean mixture in the baking dish.
Bake until bubbly, about 30 minutes. Sprinkle with almonds. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.

healthy-veggies-and-couscous.name: Healthy Veggies And Couscous
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350˚F (180°C).
Add the potatoes, broccoli florets, and red pepper to a baking sheet.
Sprinkle the garlic powder, parsley, salt, pepper, and 2 tablespoons of olive oil over the vegetables and toss to coat.
Bake for 25 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
Sprinkle the Parmesan cheese over the vegetables.
Add the vegetables to a large bowl with the cous cous and remaining tablespoon of olive oil and toss to combine.
Enjoy!

hearty-roasted-pork-loin-vegetables.name: Hearty Roasted Pork Loin & Vegetables

ingredients.prep: (about 12 ounces) ends trimmed and halved lengthwise
(about 12 ounces-360 grams), cut into  0.5-inch (1.24 cm) pieces

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220°C).
Using a sharp knife, score the fat cap of the pork loin in a crosshatch pattern. Do not cut through to the meat.

Using your hands, rub 2 tablespoon olive oil all over the pork. Liberally season all over with 1 tablespoon salt, plus more as needed. Rub 2 tablespoons of the McCormick® Savoury Spice Blend all over the pork.
Transfer the pork to a 9 x 13-inch (22 x 33 cm) baking sheet. Roast for 10 minutes, until the fat is beginning to render and brown.
Meanwhile in a large bowl add the Brussels sprouts, butternut squash, and red onion, 2 tablespoons olive oil, and 1 tablespoon McCormick® Savoury Spice Blend and toss to coat.
Remove the pork from the oven. Reduce the oven temperature to 191°C (190°C).

Evenly spread the vegetables on the baking sheet, turning the Brussels sprouts cut-side down. Clear a space in the center of the pan, then return the pork to the pan. It is okay if some of the vegetables are underneath the pork.
Return to the oven and cook for 35–50 minutes, depending on the size of the pork loin, until the internal temperature reaches 74°C (75°C).
Remove from the oven and let rest for 10–15 minutes before carving the pork and serving with the vegetables.
Enjoy!

herbed-labneh-with-preserved-lemon.name: Herbed Labneh With Preserved Lemon

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Season labneh with salt and pepper and add lemon juice to taste. Thin with water until the consistency of sour cream.

Process garlic, parsley, mint, 2 Tbsp. preserved lemon, chopped chile, cumin, and oil in a food processor until smooth; season with salt and pepper. Stir two-thirds of herb mixture into labneh. Drizzle with remaining herb mixture and top with sliced chile and more preserved lemon.

holiday-buffet-meatballs.name: Holiday Buffet Meatballs
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (160 degrees C). Place meatballs in a casserole dish.
Bake in preheated oven until warmed through, about 10 minutes.

Combine ketchup, brown sugar, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, cloves, garlic salt, and beef bouillon cube in a saucepan; bring to a boil, stirring often. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes. Pour sauce over meatballs; cover dish with aluminum foil.
Continue baking in oven until meatballs are hot, about 20 minutes.

holiday-ham-three-ways.name: Holiday Ham, Three Ways

ingredients.item: One 12-14-pound cured and smoked bone-in ham
ingredients.prep: preferably with a layer of fat

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C, with the rack in the lower third of oven. If your ham has a layer of fat, use a sharp paring knife to score the fat in a diamond crosshatch pattern, about 1 inch wide and 1/2 inch deep.
In a medium bowl, mix together the glaze ingredients of your choice. Brush all over ham (reserving some glaze for basting while cooking).
Brush the ham with maple syrup (reserving some syrup for basting while cooking). Combine the rest of the ingredients in a medium bowl, then rub all over ham, pressing into syrup to adhere.

Position roasting rack in roasting pan; pour 2 cups water into pan and place prepared ham on rack. Cover pan with foil and bake 1 hour. Remove pan from oven, remove foil, and brush ham with reserved glaze or maple syrup. Increase the oven temperature to 204°C.

Return ham to oven uncovered. Bake until glaze has caramelized and the ham's internal temp reads 57°C when an instant-read thermometer is inserted in the middle of the ham (avoiding bone), brushing with more glaze or syrup if desired, 40 minutes to 1 hour more.
Let rest 10 minutes before carving. Serve with biscuits or rolls, mustard, and pickles.
Glazes can be made up to 3 days in advance and refrigerated. Rub (without maple syrup) can be made up to 1 month in advance and kept at room temperature.

honey-bbq-sauce.name: Honey Bbq Sauce
instructions: Stir ketchup, honey, vinegar, and molasses together in a saucepan over medium heat until smooth; add liquid smoke, salt, black pepper, paprika, chili powder, onion powder, garlic powder, and cayenne pepper. Stir the seasonings into the ketchup mixture, reduce heat to low, and simmer until thickened, about 20 minutes.

honeychile-brown-butter-cornbread.name: Honeychile Brown Butter Cornbread

ingredients.item: (50 grams) canola oil or vegetable oil

instructions: Position a rack in the middle of the oven and preheat to 204°C.

In a small saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat and cook until it begins to brown and tiny flecks of nuttiness develop, about 4 minutes, being careful not to let it burn. Remove from the heat and let cool until warm to the touch.

In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, cornmeal, sugar, and baking powder until combined. In a separate medium bowl, whisk together the buttermilk, honey, oil, eggs, vanilla, and the cooled brown butter. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until well combined; set aside.

Thoroughly grease a 10-inch cast-iron skillet with bacon grease and place it in the oven to heat for 4 to 5 minutes. Transfer the skillet to a heatproof surface and pour in the batter. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, until the top is crisp and golden brown.
Transfer to a wire rack and let cool slightly, then serve straight from the skillet.

honeydew-cucumber-and-mint-soda.name: Honeydew, Cucumber, And Mint Soda

ingredients.item: Persian cucumbers or 1 english hothouse cucumber

instructions: Purée honeydew, cucumbers, mint, and salt in a blender until smooth. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl (do not press on solids, which would make mixture cloudy). Stir in lime juice and chill 1 hour.
Divide honeydew purée among ice-filled glasses. Top off with club soda and garnish with mint sprigs.
Do Ahead: Honeydew purée can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

horchata-semifreddo.name: Horchata Semifreddo

ingredients.item: Brown basmati or other long-grain brown rice
Puffed kamut or puffed rice cereal

instructions: Blend rice, cinnamon, and ¾ tsp. salt in a blender to a fine powder. Stir rice mixture and cream in a large bowl until no lumps remain; cover and chill at least 3 hours and up to 6 hours. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl, pressing on solids; reserve rice for another use.
Using an electric mixer on high speed, beat cream in a large bowl to stiff peaks, about 3 minutes; set aside.

Whisk egg whites, granulated sugar, and a pinch of salt in a medium heatproof bowl set over a saucepan of simmering water (do not let bowl touch water). Cook, whisking constantly, until sugar is dissolved and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the mixture registers 130°, about 4 minutes. Remove bowl from heat and, using an electric mixer on high speed, beat until mixture is tripled in volume, glossy, and cool, 10–12 minutes (this will take only about 6 minutes if using a stand mixer fitted with whisk attachment).
Gently fold reserved cream into meringue until mixture is smooth. Scrape into an 8x8" baking pan; cover and freeze until set, at least 3 hours.

Meanwhile, lightly coat a large heatproof bowl with nonstick spray. Place kamut in bowl. Bring brown sugar, butter, tequila, and corn syrup to a boil in a medium saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar. Cook, stirring often, until caramel is a deep amber, 10–12 minutes. Quickly pour caramel over kamut and mix with a heatproof spatula to coat. Transfer to a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet and let cool. Break into small pieces.
Scoop semifreddo into bowls and top with caramel kamut.

Do Ahead: Semifreddo can be made 3 days ahead; keep frozen. Let sit at room temperature 30 minutes before scooping. Caramel kamut can be made 1 day ahead; store airtight between layers of paper towels at room temperature.

hot-dog-onions.name: Hot Dog Onions
instructions: Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add sliced onion; cook and stir until onion has softened and turned translucent, about 5 minutes. Stir in hot sauce, yellow mustard, sugar, chili powder, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper. Reduce heat to medium-low, and continue to cook for about 5 minutes. Stir in water and tomato paste; simmer until liquid has reduced, about 20 minutes.

how-to-make-a-chilean-chorillana-comeder.name: How To Make A Chilean Chorillana
instructions: Wash the potatoes and hit them and cut them into strips.
Sazona la carne con sal y pimienta.
Warm the oil into a pot with medium heat and fry the potatoes till they get golden. Save them on paper to absorb excess fat.
Wash the onion well and cut it into julians.
Cooking the pieces of meat into a frying pan with an oil chorrit. When cooked from both sides, remove it but don't put out the fire.
Corta la carne en tiras.
The fire goes up and pits the onion into the same frying pan to impregnate from the remaining juice from the flesh. Skip her till she's golden.
Cocina los huevos fritos con un poco de sal y pimienta al gusto.
On a plate serves potatoes, then meat and onion and finally eggs. That's it.

how-to-make-a-creamy-pistachio-pesto-com.name: How To Make A Creamy Pistachio Pesto
how-to-make-a-creamy-pistachio-pesto-com.original_name: Cómo hacer un cremoso pesto de pistacho

ingredients.item: 60 gr de pistachos pelados y sin sal
1 taza de hojas frescas de albahaca
30 gr de queso parmesano finamente rallado
80 ml de aceite de oliva extra virgen
2 cds cold or pasta cooking water
Newly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: If the pistachios are raw, have them slightly in a frying pan with medium heat for 2 to 3 minutes and constantly move them. That potentiates his taste. Let them cool completely before using them.
Lava y seca muy bien las hojas de albahaca. La humedad excesiva puede afectar la textura final.
Coloca en el vaso de la licuadora o procesador los pistachos, el ajo y una pizca de sal. Tritura brevemente hasta obtener una mezcla granulada.
Add basil, parmesan, pecorino, juice and lemon frilling.
Incorpora el aceite de oliva en hilo mientras procesas a baja velocidad.
Adjust the texture by adding cold water or cooking water from the pasta, little by little, to get a creamy but slightly thick salsa.
It rectifies salt and pepper. If you want a more brilliant profile, add an additional few drops of lemon.

how-to-make-a-delicious-cheese-board-for.name: How To Make A Delicious Cheese Board For A Special Occasion
how-to-make-a-delicious-cheese-board-for.original_name: Cómo hacer una deliciosa tabla de quesos para una ocasión especial
instructions: We start our production by enlisting the fruit. After washing the orange, the kiwi and the apple, let's cut them. At this point, imagination is most important. The best way for us, however, is to cut into very thin cuts an orange and an apple, without removing its skin. And the Kiwi can cut him in half, making his forms with a sharp knife. The grapes can be put into their cluster or separated by smaller portions.
After the fruit are ready, we place the chocolates in a medium bowl, nuts, olives, blackberry jam and cream cheese into smaller containers separately.

Now with respect to cold meat, we recommend that you make forms with them to play with the visual of the table. For example, pepperoni ham can be wrapped as a flower and salami can be put as a wave into a small or medium pinch, depending on how much size you wish to manage.

Now cheeses them. The cheeddar cheese will be minced into equal cubes, and the manchego and mozzarella cheese can be cut as a rectangle or triangle with thickness. Finally we leave the Brie cheese in its same form, which is usually rectangular.

Once we have ordered everything we will proceed to set up the table. At the centre we recommend to place the chocolates and from there to order the other ingredients, alternate them with fruit, cheeses and ham, playing with sizes and textures.

how-to-make-a-delicious-salmon-burger-wi.name: How To Make A Delicious Salmon Burger With Tartar Sauce
how-to-make-a-delicious-salmon-burger-wi.original_name: Como hacer una deliciosa hamburguesa de salmón con salsa tártara

ingredients.item: 1  cucharada de cebolla morada picada fina
1  cucharada de cebolla blanca muy picada

instructions: Fold salmon with a knife or use a processor. Meg with egg, frosted bread, mustard, onion, salt and pepper. Form two burgers and get them to the refrigerator 10 minutes.
Cooking them in frying pan with a little oil, about 4 minutes per side, till they are golden and cooked.
For salsa, mix all the ingredients into a bowl. Don't have to fight a lot, just integrate. You can put her cold while cooking everything else.
Tuesta los panes si quieres. Arma con espinaca o lechuga, la hamburguesa, cebolla morada y una buena cantidad de salsa.

how-to-make-asparagus-with-ham-in-an-air.name: How To Make Asparagus With Ham In An Airfryer
how-to-make-asparagus-with-ham-in-an-air.original_name: Cómo hacer espárragos con jamón en airfryer
instructions: It purifies air frying for 180 been 3 been.
Wash up your asparagus and clear with impurities. Drain and dry with absorbing paper.
Wrap the asparagus with steamed ham up to half.
Place the asparagus wrapped with serrane ham at the airfryer bowl and purge for about 5 minutes.
During this time, the asparagus will be soften a little and the steamed ham will stick.
Remove from the air fryer and taste as an appetizer, entrance or accompaniment at your main sauces.

how-to-make-beef-burger-comedera.name: How To Make Beef Burger
instructions: We put a grill in the fire, preferably striped.
We put the ham plates on the plate and cook them for about 15 seconds from each end.
When they are best we remove them for a plate and reserve them while making meat.
We put cheeseburgers on the plate, let them cook about four minutes (as requested) and turn them around with some tweezers.
We clear the plate a little and put open bread with butter and with an inner face down to toast a little.
He puts a lettuce and sauces on the bottom cover of his bread and put his meat and then his bacon and his tomato and finally his sauces and a lettuce leaf.

how-to-make-breaded-chicken-milanesa-wit.name: How To Make Breamed Chicken Milanese with Spinach Sauce
how-to-make-breaded-chicken-milanesa-wit.original_name: Cómo hacer milanesa de pollo empanizada con salsa de espinacas

ingredients.item: 2 steaks of thin chicken breast (approx. 150 g each)
1 / 4 cup parmesan cheese with fine grated
Salt and black pepper to taste
1 cup of fresh spinach leaves (without stalks)

instructions: Beat the egg with milk and Dijon mustard. Saxony with salt and pepper. Summer the chicken steaks and leave them with 10 minutes.
Mix panko with parmesan cheese and powder garlic. Remove the excess tidal from each filet and cover with the bread mix, pressuring well to stick.
In a large frying pan, it heats up enough vegetable oil at medium-high heat. Fry the milanese for 3-4 minutes per side or till they are golden and crispy. Drain onto a grid.

In a small frying pan, melt the butter and spray the ion till clear. Add your spinach and skip a minute. Add the pink garlic and cream. Cooking 2 minutes, add cream and nutmeg. Jumped to taste. Triture everything into a blender till you get a hot willow.
Serve the milanese onto a hot psalsa miror or rinse them slightly above.

how-to-make-chickpea-burgers-in-the-oven.name: How To Make Chickpea Burgers In The Oven
how-to-make-chickpea-burgers-in-the-oven.original_name: Cómo hacer hamburguesas de garbanzos en el horno

ingredients.item: 425 g de garbanzos de lata escurridos y enjuagados
1 / 4 cup small purple onion minced (about 1 / 2 small purple onion)
2 tablespoons of tahini or peanut butter
1 / 2 cup minced cilantro ((you can also use fresh parsley))

instructions: In a big bowl, place the tippple and rinsed chickpeas. With the help of a bad man, put them up till they get dough.
Add onion, garlic, cumin, taheni, ground bread and cilantro. It revels very well until the ingredients are integrated evenly.
Con las manos forma las hamburguesas de 8-10 cm de ancho y 1 cm de grosor.
On a plate with slightly oiled baking paper, place burgers and baker at 180 ° C (350ºF) for 15 minutes. Flip the cheeseburgers and baker for another 15 minutes.
Retira el horno y sirve inmediatamente entre pan para hamburguesa.
Join with your favorite dressings and toppings. Enjoy.

how-to-make-chorizo-and-cheese-tamales-s.name: How To Make Chorizo
how-to-make-chorizo-and-cheese-tamales-s.original_name: Cómo hacer tamales de chorizo y queso paso a paso

ingredients.item: 1 ½ cup pork butter (at room temperature)
20 more maize and 6 more to cover the pot (soaked and drained)

instructions: In a frying pan with medium fire adds the pits.
Cooking for 7 minutes or until you have let go and have been slightly cooked.
Add jalapeno cut into strips and cook for 3 minutes or till soft.
En un recipiente acrema la manteca de cerdo.
To another container add tamal flour, baking powder, sodium bicarbonate and salt.
Mix slightly and add water little by little and mix until integrated.
Amasa con las manos limpias para integrar todo.
Incorpora la manteca y amasa por 10 minutos.
Cubre el recipiente con papel film y deja reposar durante 10 minutos.
To put together the tamales, take a leaf and fill with a portion of mass and leave a cape that isn't very thin.
Filling with chorizo, mozzarella and jalapeno.
Cierra el tamal y repite con toda la masa que tengas.
En una olla alta agrega suficiente agua y la vaporera.
Make a bed with corn leaves and place the pits with the opening up.
Cover with more leaves and cover the pot.
Lleva el agua a hervor y cocina a fuego medio alto durante 1 hora y 30 minutos.
When they're ready, get them out of the fire and let them rest an hour.
Disfruta caliente con tus salsas favoritas.

how-to-make-grouper-in-white-wine-sauce-.name: How To Make Grouper In White Wine Sauce
how-to-make-grouper-in-white-wine-sauce-.original_name: Cçomo hacer mero en salsa de vino blanco
instructions: Begins the recipe and sauona on both sides the moor steaks with salt and pepper.
Warm up a frying bread with olive oil, while at a very good temperature seal the fish from both sides till it's golden.
When sealed, remove the frying bread and reserve.
Later, have an onion and cut into julians. He also steals his garlic teeth and cuts his parsley.
In the same frying pan, add some more oil and paint garlic teeth next to the ion, and later incorporates the white wine and a tablet of cream.
Fits with some salt and pepper, mix and put down the fire. Kitchen for 2 minutes.
He then incorporates his moor steaks and ends up making his fish into his white wine sauce. till it's reduced and textured. Cooking for about 5 minutes.
Turn off and serve the steak with the salsa and the chopped parsley. Be with your favorite garrison.

how-to-make-peach-crumble-step-by-step-c.name: How To Make Peach Crumble, Step By Step

instructions: In a frying pan with medium heat, heat up the sugar with water without moving too much till it takes a golden amber color.

Vierte la mezcla sobre el caramelo en los moldes.
Put the mold into an oven plate with hot water (seawater bath) and baker for 40-50 minutes or until the flan's firm at the edges but slightly shivering at the centre.

how-to-prepare-sangria-sorbet-at-home-co.name: How To Prepare Sangria Sorbet At Home
how-to-prepare-sangria-sorbet-at-home-co.original_name: Cómo preparar sorbete de sangría en casa

ingredients.item: 250 ml of fruity young red wine (preferably early)
1 / 2 Green apple in very small cubes
2 cds of white sugar or fine panels (30 g)
1 purified egg clear (optional for more airy text)

instructions: In a small pot, add water, Sugar and Honey. It's been at medium heat for about 5 minutes till we get a light syrup. Remove and let completely cool.
In a spacious bowl, mix the Red Wine, Orange Liquor, Orange Juice, Lemon Juice and Orange Filling.
It incorporates apple and minced strawberries. Add the mint and pinch of cinnamon if you choose to use it.
Add cold syrup to oblend and remove well to integrate flavors.
If you wish for a more creative and airy text, slightly pat the clear pestieurized to a spreading point and insisted with wrapped movements.
Take the mixture to a frosted container. Congela for 3 to 4 hours, stirring with a fork every 40 minutes to break the ice crystals and achieve Sorbet texture.
Before serving, let rest at room temperature for 5 minutes and scrape with a fork or processor to get a fine and granulated consistency.

huevos-rancheros-with-broiled-tomato-sal.name: Huevos Rancheros With Broiled Tomato Salsa

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
To 4 warm flour or corn tortillas

instructions: Adjust oven rack to upper third position and heat broiler. Line rimmed baking sheet with foil. Place tomatoes and chilies on sheet, drizzle with 2 tablespoons oil, and season with salt and pepper. Toss to coat and arrange in single layer. Broil until tomatoes and chilies begin to char, 8 to 10 minutes, stirring once halfway through cooking. Note that all broilers are different and attention should be paid to the vegetables as they cook.
Transfer baking sheet to cooling rack and allow to cool 5 minutes. Transfer tomatoes and chilies to food processor and pulse until a chunky, salsa-like consistency is reached.

Heat additional 2 tablespoons oil in medium skillet over medium heat until shimmering. Add onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and translucent, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute. Increase heat to medium-high and add tomato-chili mixture. Cook, stirring occasionally, until liquid is slightly reduced, about 3 minutes. Stir in vinegar and continue cooking until sauce is thick but still juicy, about 2 minutes longer. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Transfer sauce to bowl and cover to keep warm.

Thoroughly wipe out skillet. Heat remaining 2 tablespoons oil over medium-high heat. Add eggs and season with salt and pepper. Once whites begin to turn opaque and set, reduce heat to medium low, cover, and cook until egg yolks reach desired consistency, 2 to 4 minutes. Transfer eggs to plate, cover with sauce, and serve with warmed tortillas.
